title: manihot glabrata
intro: Manihot glabrata, also known as the smooth cassava, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Manihot glabrata include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or topical application, and is commonly used in herbal remedies to promote healing and well-being.
